Privacy Policy

Last Updated: April 10, 2026

Overview

sbti-test.art (hereinafter referred to as "this site") respects and protects the privacy of all users. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

Information Collection

This site is a purely static website that does not require user registration or login. We do not collect any personally identifiable information (PII). Your SBTI test answers are processed locally in your browser and are never transmitted to any server.

Cookie Usage

This site may use essential cookies to save your language preference settings. We do not use cookies for user tracking or advertising purposes.

Third-Party Services

This site is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Cloudflare may collect basic access log information (such as IP addresses, browser types, etc.) for security and performance optimization purposes. Please refer to Cloudflare's privacy policy for details.

Data Security

Since this site does not collect or store user data, there is no risk of data breaches. All test processing is completed on the client side in your browser.

Children's Privacy

This site does not intentionally collect personal information from children under the age of 13. If you are a parent or guardian and discover that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

Policy Changes

We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us through the contact methods provided on this site.

SBTI Test

A More Fun, More Real Personality Test

This test is for entertainment only — don't take it seriously
